backlog.title: aios-evidence full Wave-13 RecordType vocabulary + Ed25519 signature path
acceptance_criteria: RecordType extended from 39 variants to the full 427-entry Wave-13 reconciled vocabulary per S3.1 Appendix A (plus RecordTypeUnspecified = 0 if needed for proto compatibility)
Variants assigned in declaration order matching Appendix A IDs 1..427
All variants reject silently on unknown serde input (closed-enum discipline preserved)
Ed25519 signature integration path scaffolded (or explicitly punted to T-009) — at minimum a signed_with_key() builder method that consumes the Vault Broker capability handle
Per-RecordType payload schemas remain deferred to Wave 14+ per S3.1 §29.6

completed.title: aios-action integration tests + golden fixtures + RFC 8785 full adoption (M1 closure)
completed.evidence: cargo build/test/clippy --workspace --all-targets -D warnings all PASS + cargo fmt --check PASS; 102 tests green (76 unit + 26 integration); serde_jcs 0.1 added to workspace deps (Governor approved); canonical.rs delegates to serde_jcs::to_string (RFC 8785 ECMA-262 number normalization closed — golden test pins that 1.5e2 and 150.0 produce identical request_hash); CanonicalError simplified to single Projection variant (sort_value helper retired); tests/common/mod.rs shared helpers + 3 integration test files (golden_envelope: 8, lifecycle_replay: 6, error_paths: 12); 3 hand-written golden JSON fixtures (envelope_success_full / envelope_policy_denied / envelope_rolled_back) each parse + validate phase ↔ conditions + JCS canonical round-trip stable; M1 closed

completed.title: aios-evidence crate skeleton (S3.1 evidence log foundation)
completed.evidence: cargo build/test/clippy --workspace --all-targets -D warnings all PASS + cargo fmt --check PASS; 133 tests green (29 new unit + 2 new integration = +31 over M1's 102); crates/aios-evidence registered as workspace member; 5 modules (error/record/receipt/chain/sealed); EvidenceReceipt envelope with ALL fields private and ONLY &self accessors — INV-005 (append-only) enforced at type level; ReceiptBuilder consuming-builder seals via BLAKE3-256(JCS(payload)) for content_hash + BLAKE3-truncated-32(JCS(prior)) for link; ReceiptChain append-only Vec with verify_integrity() walking windows(2); RetentionClass closed 3-variant enum; RecordType closed 39-variant subset (action lifecycle 11 + namespace 2 + vault/recovery/tamper 7 + AI-barriers 4 + build/test 7 + FSM extras 8) with TODO(T-008) for full 428; Sealed marker trait with private super-trait blocks downstream impl; EvidenceError 8-variant closed enum; first cross-crate workspace dependency exercising aios-action's public re-exports
